{{- $tpl := templates.Current.Name }} {{- $idx := math.Counter }} {{- warnf "[%04d][ %-20s ] : %s " $idx $tpl .page.Path }} {{- $menuID := .menuID }} {{- $page := .page }} {{- with index site.Menus $menuID }}
{{- partial "inline/menu/walk.html" (dict "page" $page "menuEntries" .) }}
{{- end }} {{- define "_partials/inline/menu/walk.html" }} {{- $page := .page }} {{- range .menuEntries }}
{{- $attrs := dict "href" .URL }} {{- /* base class depending on active state */}} {{- $class := "menu-button" }} {{- if $page.IsMenuCurrent .Menu . }} {{- $class = "menu-button menu-button--active" }} {{- $attrs = merge $attrs (dict "aria-current" "page") }} {{- else if and ($page.HasMenuCurrent .Menu .) (not .Parent) }} {{- /* only apply ancestor to top-level entries, not submenu entries */}} {{- $class = "menu-button menu-button--ancestor" }} {{- $attrs = merge $attrs (dict "aria-current" "true") }} {{- end }} {{- /* append overview modifier when name is Overview */}} {{- if eq .Weight 1 }} {{- $class = printf "%s menu-button--overview" $class }} {{- end }} {{- $attrs = merge $attrs (dict "class" $class) }} {{- $name := .Name }} {{- with .Identifier }} {{- with T . }} {{- $name = . }} {{- end }} {{- end }} {{- if .HasChildren }} {{- $attrs = merge $attrs (dict "aria-haspopup" "true" "aria-controls" (add "submenu-" $name)) }} {{- /* group headers without a URL are not focusable as links - make them keyboard-reachable */}} {{- if not .URL }} {{- $attrs = merge $attrs (dict "tabindex" "0" "role" "button") }} {{- end }} {{- end }} {{ $name }} {{- with .Children }}
{{- partial "inline/menu/walk.html" (dict "page" $page "menuEntries" .) }}
{{- end }}
{{- end }} {{- end }}
